hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '^/Users/c5263507/dynamic-connection-planner/src/.*\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd /Users/c5263507/dynamic-connection-planner && CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --passWithNoTests 2>&1 | tail -20 > /tmp/dcdc-test-result.txt; EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; if [ "$EXIT" != "0" ]; then RESULT=$(cat /tmp/dcdc-test-result.txt); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PostToolUse\", \"additionalContext\": \"TESTS FAILED after editing $FILE:\n$RESULT\"}}"; fi; fi
